use_cases: Text alignment controls in rich text editors and document editors
Formatting toolbar for content creation platforms
Action bar in code editors or IDEs
Quick-access formatting controls in CMS interfaces
ai_summary: A composite toolbar component from Base UI featuring alignment buttons (left/right), toggle groups, and separator elements for organizing formatting controls. The component implements accessible keyboard navigation with focus-visible states and pressed states for toggle interactions, styled with a clean flat design using neutral grays suitable for document editing, code editors, and content management interfaces.
